title: SMRPG Forest Maze Mario Paint Composer - Higher Quality
description:
100,000 views November 13 2009

I decided that for reaching 100 subscribers I would re-record my 2 most popular videos using the more superior recoring software I own now and edit them so there isn't a gaping err... gap.

Lol

I did not alter the song from the original so it's still the same song, but with better quality, no lag, correct sync, and more loops.

So here is the new and improved Forest Maze!

Software used:
Music: Mario Paint Composer - http://www.unfungames.com/mariopaint/

Notation: MidiNotate Player - http://www.notation.com/MidiNotatePlayer.htm

Video: Camstudio 2.0 - http://camstudio.org/

Editing: Windows Movie Maker

All free, legal, and unlimited.
